title: National Institute of Design Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: National Institute of Design Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: National Institute of Design Result 2026 Out for B.Des DAT Mains Final Result on the official website - admissions.nid.edu on 2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the NID DAT result.

content.text: National Institute of Design (NID) has officially released the NID DAT 2026 Mains Result for the B.Des admission process for the academic session 2026-27. Candidates who appeared for the Design Aptitude Test (DAT) Mains can now check their final results online.

National Institute of Design Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - https://admissions.nid.edu/NIDA2026/ResultBDes2026Final.aspx. The result is available for undergraduate B.Des admissions, and shortlisted candidates are required to proceed with document upload and institute preference submission. Students can check and download their results using their login credentials such as email ID and password.
Candidates are advised to verify all the details mentioned in their result carefully. In case of any discrepancies, they should immediately contact the NID admission authorities.

sections.heading: National Institute of Design Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: National Institute of Design has declared the B.Des DAT Mains Final Result 2026 for admission to undergraduate design programs. Candidates can log in to the official portal to access their results and complete further admission formalities.

sections.heading: National Institute of Design Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: National Institute of Design has activated the direct link to check the NID DAT 2026 Mains Result for B.Des admissions. Candidates can view and download their results instantly through the official portal using their login credentials.

sections.heading: How to Download NID DAT 2026 Mains Result

content.text: Follow the steps below to check and download your NID DAT Result 2026:

items: Click on the "NID DAT 2026 Mains Result" link
Enter your registered email ID and password
Your result will appear on the screen
Download and save the result for future reference
